name: Spicy Breakfast Pattycakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients except the oil in a large mixing bowl, and stir well but do not overmix.
Cover, and refrigerate for 1 hour.
2. Shape the turkey mixture into 12 patties about 2-1/2 inches in diameter.
3. Heat the oil in a large skillet, and brown the patties over medium heat, on both sides, about 2 minutes per side. Reduce the heat to medium-low, cover the skillet, and cook, turning the patties occasionally, until they are crisp and cooked through, about 6 minutes. (You may have to do this in two batches.) Serve immediately.
